messages.content: Ok. I’ve been talking to one of you !! I want to buy a replacement battery for my Roamer. You have one on sale for 419.  If it fits my bike and you think my charger will work with your battery, I would like to order it ! How long does it take to ship to me ?

For the Roamer 2.0, the correct battery is the R129-15AH Rhino 7, priced at $699.99. It is compatible with the standard charger if your Roamer uses the same voltage and connector type. Shipping typically takes 3-7 business days after processing, which usually takes 1-2 business days. If you would like to proceed with the order, just say 'order it' and I'll create a direct secure checkout link for you.
